title: lysimachusa nemorum
intro: Lysimachusa nemorum, also known as Hairy Basil, is a fragrant herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, Lysimachusa nemorum has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lysimachusa nemorum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve respiratory health. Lysimachusa nemorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and has also been used in traditional cooking and as a natural insect repellent.
